title: Antenatal routine review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-assessed risk without automated classification.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.

investigations.text: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.
investigations.rationale: Relevant only with gestation and actual assessed findings.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

exact_section.heading: Appendix 1 — Routine Antenatal Screening and Care

referral.text: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.
referral.evidence_extract: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Gestation, parity, risk status, symptoms, measurements, tests, ultrasound and care setting are absent.
No normality, risk class, investigation, supplement, follow-up interval or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
